title: CtxVault Context Injection M1
current_summary: CtxVault must turn project docs, session history, and knowledge notes into reviewed workstream context before injecting AGENTS.md, CLAUDE.md, or a human-readable workstream projection.
claims: Raw session or knowledge imports are evidence, not durable injected truth.
Approved workstream and memory objects are the only durable context inputs for the M1 harness projections.
Every injected output must have a projection receipt with source refs and output hashes.
